name: GPT 5.6 Terra
description: GPT 5.6 Terra is OpenAI's balanced GPT-5.6 model for everyday work across reasoning, coding, and assistant workflows.

links.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition

details.name: availability
details.value: OpenAI released GPT-5.6 Terra on July 9, 2026 and lists GPT-5.6 as available across ChatGPT, Codex, and the OpenAI API, with rollout continuing globally over the following 24 hours.

details.name: prompt_caching
details.value: Supports explicit cache breakpoints and a 30-minute minimum cache life during preview.

details.name: service_tiers
details.value: Prepared for standard, flex, priority, and batch API service tiers from the July 9, 2026 release date.

details.name: pricing
details.value: Official preview pricing is $2.5/M input tokens, $0.25/M cached-read input tokens, $3.125/M cache-write input tokens, and $15/M output tokens on standard processing.
